name: Vivid Aura Jewels
description: Exquisite gold ear cuff with a delicate crystal accent. Perfect for adding a touch of brilliance to your everyday look.
care: Avoid contact with water and perfume. Store in a cool, dry place.

name: Majestic Flora Nectar
description: A stunning multicolor floral crystal necklace that captures the essence of spring. A statement piece for any occasion.
care: Clean with a soft cloth after use.

name: Golden Sphere Huggies
description: Chunky gold dome huggie earrings that offer a bold yet refined look. A must-have for your jewelry collection.

name: Amber Lace Earrings
description: Intricately textured gold filigree drop earrings. Elegant and timeless design for the modern woman.
care: Handle with care to preserve the delicate filigree.

name: Royal Heirloom Set
description: A beautifully gift-boxed earring and necklace set. The perfect gift for someone special or a treat for yourself.
care: Comes with a protective jewelry box.
